nodes.summary: Buru thrush（Geokichla dumasi）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Buru thrush。

nodes.name: Buru thrush
nodes.summary: The Buru thrush (Geokichla dumasi) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is endemic to montane rainforest on Buru in Indonesia. Traditionally, it included the Seram thrush as a subspecies, in which case the common name of the 'combined species' was Moluccan thrush. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Buru thrush (Geokichla dumasi) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is endemic to montane rainforest on Buru in Indonesia.

nodes.name: Geokichla
nodes.summary: Geokichla（Geokichla）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联21种鸟类，如Pied thrush、Spotted ground thrush、Black-eared ground thrush等21种鸟类。
